title: senecio × hybridus
intro: Senecio × hybridus, commonly known as Jacob's Ladder or Jacob's Staff, is a hybrid plant in the daisy family, derived from the cross between Senecio cereus and Senecio erucifolius. The plant is rich in sesquiterpene lactones, which are known for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Senecio × hybridus include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
